name: download_opt_2_7b_pytorch_only
command: from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download(repo_id='facebook/opt-2.7b', local_dir='/data/models/opt-2.7b', local_dir_use_symlinks=False, allow_patterns=['config.json','generation_config.json','pytorch_model.bin','merges.txt','vocab.json','tokenizer_config.json','special_tokens_map.json']); print('downloaded /data/models/opt-2.7b pytorch-only')
